description: Each case is a messy SaaS feature request. We run the agent WITH and WITHOUT the skill, then validate the output. The with-skill run should pass validation; the no-skill run should fail because the bare model rambles and omits required sections.

cases.input: hey can we add a dark mode to the app? people keep asking. should be easy. make sure it looks good.
planted_gaps: No success metric (what does 'looks good' mean?)
Unspecified: should it follow the OS setting?
assertions: Acceptance criteria are testable (contain a number or clear condition)
The missing accessibility constraint appears under Open Questions or Compliance Flags

cases.input: we need users to be able to export their data. finance asked for it. probably csv. oh and it should be fast even for big accounts.
planted_gaps: 'Big accounts' is not defined (how many rows?)
No mention of what data fields are included or PII handling
assertions: 'fast' is converted into a measurable criterion (e.g. completes in under N seconds)
A PII / data-handling flag appears under Compliance Flags

cases.input: add notifications so users know when stuff happens. email is fine. dont spam them.
planted_gaps: 'Stuff happens' is undefined (which events trigger a notification?)
assertions: At least one acceptance criterion defines a frequency or rate limit
An opt-out / unsubscribe requirement appears (criteria or open questions)
